response.justification: Candidate has roughly 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems with strong testing discipline and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators). However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. The resume shows primarily Senior/Staff IC roles with limited evidence of principal-level strategic influence, no demonstrated AI products at scale, no advanced degree in AI, and minimal cloud-platform depth beyond AWS CDK usage. The recent AI-agent work is too brief and unproven for a principal AI strategy role.
strengths: Long tenure (15+ years) across diverse engineering domains with TDD/CI/CD discipline
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Founder experience building and operating an open-source platform end-to-end
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale matching principal-level expectations
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level strategic leadership
Limited cloud-platform depth and no advanced degree in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC expectations
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
